title: Best House Aluminium Kitchen Catering Foil Roll 300mm x 30m, Aluminium Tin Foil Roll Kitchen Cooking Foil for Hot Food Wrapping Baking Storing, Keep Food Fresh & Hot Long Time (Pack of 3)
features: KITCHEN CATERING FOIL: These aluminium kitchen catering foil made from excellent quality, this foil is thick as well as extremely durable.
USES FOR FOOD WRAP: Kitchen catering aluminium foil is used for grilling, freezer storage, or even to wrap potato in for roasting, store leftovers, prepare meals in advance or cover dishes.
COOKING MADE BETTER: Our aluminum tin foil is safe for all types of food contact, whether raw, dry, cooked, or steamed, keeping your food secure and fresh for long time.

MULTI-PURPOSE USED: Use to line baking sheets, roasting pans, or wrapping food, grilling vegetables, freezing, storage. These aluminum foil protects food against light, oxygen, humidity and bacteria. Also can maintain the moisture and temperature of your food with our aluminum foil.
PACKAGE CONTENTS: 3 Rolls (Each Rolls - 30 Metres long x 300mm wide)
Perfect for all types of food
